prompt: three groups each with three students far apart, one group with yellow colored hoodies, other with blue and red, each group in a circle of their respective colors on a white coloured floor, while a teacher is gathering the children to their respective groups. It should act as a metaphor to clustering in machine learning. Photo from exact top like a drone pov, cinematic hdr effect. The scene must be physically plausible — it should look like something a photographer could have taken or a painter could have observed in the world. The concept must be identifiable by a domain expert from the image alone, without requiring your explanation./nNegative_prompt: No diagrams, graphs, mathematical notation, equations, or text of any kind within the image. No floating labels, annotation overlays, or anything that would not exist in an actual physical scene. No neurons firing, gears turning, or data flowing through pipes — stock AI metaphors.
metaphor: Children in colored hoodies represent data points moving into matching floor circles; the hoodies act as features and the circles as centroids during the assignment phase of clustering.
